CustomField.description: The commitment agreement defines the actions applicants agree to take in order to remain on the waiting list, and the actions that program agrees to take in order to provide a home to purchase. If checked, the applicant has signed the agreement.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The commitment agreement defines the actions applicants agree to take in order to remain on the waiting list, and the actions that program agrees to take in order to provide a home to purchase. If checked, the applicant has signed the agreement.
CustomField.label: Signed Commitment Agreement
